title: Folder schema
description: Canonical folder-body schema. CENTRALIZED: resolved from the management space for every space (SchemaValidator special-cases the shortname), and EXACT: additionalProperties is false at every level, so unknown or misspelled fields are rejected rather than silently ignored.

disable_filter.title: Disable filter
disable_filter.description: The search filter icon / functionality is disabled

expand_children.title: Expand folders' children
expand_children.description: If the folder should expand children

append_subpath.title: Append subpath
append_subpath.description: Append string to the query subpath

enable_pdf_schema_shortnames.title: List of schema shortnames for which pdf icon is displayed

workflow_shortnames.title: Workflow shortnames
workflow_shortnames.description: Tickets created in this folder must declare one of these workflows

icon.title: folder main icon
icon.description: The icon displayed next to the folder

icon_opened.title: folder opened icon
icon_opened.description: The icon displayed next to the folder when opened

icon_closed.title: folder closed icon
icon_closed.description: The icon displayed next to the folder when closed

sort_by.title: sort by
sort_by.description: the field name to be used in ordering

sort_type.title: sort order
sort_type.description: the ordering of the sort asc/desc

content_resource_types.title: Resource types
content_resource_types.description: Resources created in this folder must be one of these types

content_schema_shortnames.title: schema shortname
content_schema_shortnames.description: Entries created in this folder that declare a schema must use one of these

index_attributes.title: index attributes
index_attributes.description: the attributes from the schema that should be displayed in index page

unique_fields.title: Unique Fields
unique_fields.description: List of list of composite fields which should be unique accross the folder entries

allow_view.title: flag to enable or disable resource view inside this folder
allow_view.description: flag to enable or disable resource view inside this folder

allow_create.title: flag to enable or disable resource creation inside this folder
allow_create.description: flag to enable or disable resource creation inside this folder

allow_create_category.title: flag to enable or disable folder creation inside this folder
allow_create_category.description: flag to enable or disable folder creation inside this folder

allow_update.title: flag to enable or disable resource update inside this folder
allow_update.description: flag to enable or disable resource update inside this folder

allow_delete.title: flag to enable or disable resource delete inside this folder
allow_delete.description: flag to enable or disable resource delete inside this folder

allow_csv.title: flag to enable or disable CSV download button
allow_csv.description: Allow the user to download csv of the displayed list

allow_upload_csv.title: flag to enable or disable CSV upload feature
allow_upload_csv.description: Allow the user to upload  csv

use_media.title: does the content inside this folder has a media or not
use_media.description: does the content inside this folder has a media or not
